title: Aberration
description: An intense and immersive experience combining survival, strategy, and high-stakes adventure into one Minecraft modpack.
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dc850a66c538ace312279f0f215254fb2a5b60d_0.webp)
Welcome to **Aberration**, an intense and immersive experience combining survival, strategy, and high-stakes adventure into one Minecraft mod pack.

**Gameplay** -
Prepare to explore, loot, and extract in a world filled with danger and opportunity. Our mod pack emphasizes strategic decision-making. Seek valuable loot in perilous areas, weighing the benefits against the risks. Every choice matters, leading to unpredictable and exhilarating gameplay experiences. Engage in alliances or rivalries as the map design and loot system naturally draw players together. Experience dynamic, player-driven stories filled with tension and excitement.

![group and deploy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c206c09f697cc59baed92c9998823a52562b6d9a_0.webp)
Leave the safe-zone using our intuitive group management system with our custom GUI. Strategically plan your deployment by selecting sectors on the map, team up with friends and take on opposing groups, choose your favorite loadout and deploy.

![loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ffecce657619c167b5259b8af9ea04789d023df_0.webp)
To secure your loot, you must extract with it. Use static extraction points for a steady but challenging exit or dynamic extraction points for a faster, high-risk escape that announced your presence to nearby players.
 
![extract](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a29a30a9863b7a3a868fb61b9c49be50f271a078_0.webp)
Your mission is to gather as much loot as possible and extract it safely. Higher tier loot is found in more dangerous areas, creating a thrilling risk/reward dynamic. Travel to these zones to find the best items and face intense challenges.

Our modpack offers a unique blend of survival, strategy, and intense player interactions. With our innovative deployment system, balanced risk/reward mechanics, and diverse extraction points, we promise an engaging and challenging experience. Dive into the ultimate adventure, where every decision matters and only the bravest will succeed. Happy looting and good luck!

**Featuring**

- **50+ Guns**
- **Moderated Official Servers**
- **Huge Custom Map** (Currently in Development)
- **1000+ Custom Props and Blocks**
- **Hordes of Infected**
- **Immersive Looting**
- **Custom Traders and Quests**

https://discord.gg/3zWykM8tGE
